name: bloodkings-status-frontend-deps
description: apps/status has no build step - it's plain PHP deployed as-is via FTP. This manifest exists only so Dependabot can see and version-bump the frontend libraries that are actually loaded via pinned CDN <script>/<link> URLs directly in the PHP templates (functions.php, index.php, admin.php). There is no npm install here and no node_modules gets deployed. When Dependabot opens a bump PR, the matching CDN URL in the PHP file must be updated by hand to match.
